passport.expiry_min_6m: Passport expires in less than 6 months — most countries will refuse. Please renew.
passport.expiry_min_3m: Passport expires in less than 3 months — some airlines will deny boarding. Consider renewing.
passport.no_format: Passport number format is invalid. PRC passports must be 1 letter + 8 digits.
passport.dob_past: Date of birth cannot be in the future.
passport.age_min_16: Applicant must be at least 16 years old. Otherwise a guardian must apply on their behalf.
passport.name_length: Surname / given name must be 1–64 characters.

image.blur: Image is too blurry. Retake with good lighting.
image.resolution: Resolution too low. Minimum 800×600 pixels required.
image.size: File too large. Single file must be ≤ 10MB. Compress and re-upload.
image.format: Unsupported format. Only JPEG / PNG / WebP / PDF allowed.

travel.date_range: Travel date must be within the next 12 months and not in the past.
travel.stay_max: Stay exceeds 90 days — you may need a long-stay visa instead.

student.enrollment_age: Enrollment letter is older than 90 days. Please request a fresh one.

photo.face: No clear face detected. Please upload a front-facing, uncovered photo.
photo.bg: Photo background must be pure white. Current background is not compliant.

ocr.confidence: OCR confidence is low. Please upload a clearer original.

pass.ok: Field passed all checks. No action needed.

ratelimit.page_subtitle: Watch live traffic and tune submission pacing in real time
ratelimit.config_subtitle: Changes take effect immediately on save (persisted to rpa_config.yaml)
ratelimit.ip_per_day_label: Max visits per IP per day
ratelimit.ip_per_day_hint: Cap on how many times a single IP may hit the visa portal in 24h (default 50)
ratelimit.account_interval_hint: Minimum gap (minutes) between two submissions from the same account (default 30)
ratelimit.off_peak_hint: Loosen rate-limits in this window (e.g. late-night) to reduce risk of being flagged
ratelimit.rate_key_hint: Bucket by IP, IP+UA, or Cookie
ratelimit.stat_queued_hint: Tasks currently in IDLE / SUBMITTING / WAITING
ratelimit.stat_active_accounts_hint: Accounts with at least one in-flight task right now
ratelimit.err_ip_range: IP per-day limit must be between {min} and {max}
ratelimit.err_interval_range: Account interval must be between {min} and {max} minutes

agreement.__legal_review_pending__: TODO: Legal review required before 2026-07-01 launch — see docs/LEGAL_REVIEW_NOTES.md
agreement.page_subtitle: Please read the following terms carefully
agreement.terms_section_1_body: Htex (the 'Platform') provides visa application material organization, OCR recognition, AI pre-validation, RPA auto-submission, and visa refusal insurance. The Platform does not issue visas; final decisions are made by embassies and consulates.
agreement.terms_section_2_body: Users must ensure all submitted identity, passport, and travel information is true, accurate, and complete. Any consequences from false information (refusal, fines, legal action) are the user's responsibility.
agreement.terms_section_3_body: Service fees are charged per order. Platform-caused failures are fully refunded; user-caused refusals are handled per the Refusal Insurance Terms.
agreement.terms_section_4_body: The Platform strictly protects user privacy. See the Privacy Policy for details.
agreement.privacy_section_1_body: To provide visa services, the Platform collects phone number, identity, passport, travel, and payment information as necessary.
agreement.privacy_section_2_body: Your information is used only for visa applications, customer support, risk control, and legal compliance — never for other commercial purposes.
agreement.privacy_section_3_body: Your data is encrypted and stored on servers in mainland China, transmitted over HTTPS / TLS 1.3. Any third-party access requires your explicit consent.
agreement.privacy_section_4_body: You may view, correct, or delete your personal information at any time. Contact support to delete your account.

payment.page_subtitle: Secure payment by Stripe · Protected by VisaOps
payment.success_message: Your order has been paid successfully. We'll submit your visa application right away.
payment.failed_message: This payment could not be completed. Reason: {reason}
payment.failed_reason_card_declined: Your card was declined. Please try another card or contact your bank.
payment.failed_reason_insufficient_funds: Insufficient funds. Please top up or use another payment method.
payment.failed_reason_network_error: Network error. Please try again later.
payment.failed_reason_expired_session: Payment session expired. Please start a new payment.
payment.failed_reason_unknown: Payment failed. Please retry or contact support.
payment.pending_message: We're waiting for the final confirmation from the payment channel. Please hold on…
payment.cancelled_message: You cancelled this payment. To retry, click the button below.
payment.not_found_message: Order {orderId} does not exist or the payment record has expired.

rpa.page_subtitle: The bot is submitting your visa application — please wait
rpa.subtitle_submitting: The RPA bot is visiting the visa portal, filling the form, and submitting your application
rpa.subtitle_done: Your visa application has been successfully submitted to the official system and is awaiting review
rpa.subtitle_error: An issue occurred during submission. Please check the reason and retry
rpa.error_unknown: Unknown error — please try again later
rpa.error_network: Network error — please check your connection and retry
rpa.error_timeout: Request timed out — the system will auto-retry in 30 minutes
rpa.error_retry_hint: If the issue persists, please contact support
rpa.status_page_subtitle: Enter order number or task ID to query RPA submission status in real time
rpa.query_placeholder: Enter order number or task ID
rpa.query_hint: Supports order number (ORD_xxx) or task ID (rpa_xxx)
rpa.empty_result: No related task found — please verify the order number or task ID
rpa.foot_note: Submission is handled automatically by the RPA bot — typically takes 2-5 minutes. You'll receive an email/SMS notification once submitted.
rpa.err_query_required: Please enter an order number or task ID
rpa.err_not_found: Task not found — it may not have been submitted yet or the task ID is incorrect
rpa.err_unknown: Query failed — please try again later
